# function: map_product

Given two map(string) arguments, return a map with keys that are a product of input keys joined by `separator`, and value is a two-element list containing original values

## Example Usage

```terraform
output "map_product" {
  value = provider::functions::map_product(
    {
      privateDns1 = "storage"
      privateDns2 = "webapps"
    },
    {
      vNet1 = "office"
      vNet2 = "field"
    },
    ":"
  )
}
```

## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
map_product(first map of string, second map of string, separator string) map of list of string
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `first` (Map of String) First map
1. `second` (Map of String) Second map
1. `separator` (String) separator to join keys on
